# agentops_knowledge_base_agent (Resource)

Attaches an agent to a knowledge base. This association cannot be updated in place; changing either argument forces a new grant.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Grant an agent access to a knowledge base.
resource "agentops_knowledge_base_agent" "runbooks_to_agent" {
  kb_id    = agentops_knowledge_base.runbooks.id
  agent_id = "agent_01hxyz"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agent_id` (String) ID of the agent to attach. Changing this forces a new grant.
- `kb_id` (String) ID of the knowledge base to attach the agent to. Changing this forces a new grant.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) Grant identifier.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# KB agent grants are imported by "<kb_id>/<agent_id>".
terraform import agentops_knowledge_base_agent.runbooks_to_agent kb_01hxyz/agent_01hxyz
```
